Name: -1_General
Representative_Docs: ["So, while it's easy to introduce more technology that grabs the headlines, it's harder to engineer it with the precision, the ergonomics, and the safety that makes our customers' lives better. So, ladies and gentlemen, as I stated in the beginning, the new Leaf is not just an EV. With the combination of customers and experience under our belt, The new Nissan Leaf is the right vehicle with the right technology at the right time.", "It stands for Electric Global Modular Platform, and every future model in Hyundai's new electric vehicle series will be built on it, thanks to its remarkable flexibility. And that's a big reason why the IONIQ 5 will get a range of up to 300 miles when you choose the rear wheel drive option. That's right, rear-wheel drive, another first for Hyundai.", 'You can count on the Nissan Intelligent Mobility and Nissan Motor Corporation. Before we close, please enjoy the new TV commercial of the new Nissan Leaf. Thank you for your kind attention.']

Name: 0_A
Representative_Docs: ["It's possible to charge this new model with 170 kilowatts. For the driver it means you will be able to charge a car in about 30 minutes. Power and design, that's really performance from Audi.", "Good, how are you? Great. Here's the car.", 'We would like to introduce you to the Mitsubishi iMii, our new all-electric vehicle, which is being jointly developed with the Japanese Electric Power Company based on the concept of the i. The engine layout of the i is different from a conventional front-wheel drive car. It uses a rear midship layout with a mid-motor and rear drive.']

Name: 1_LLM label unavailable: and, with, the, to, hybrid, prius, available, toyota, of, standard
Representation: ['LLM label unavailable: and, with, the, to, hybrid, prius, available, toyota, of, standard']
Representative_Docs: ['Every grade comes standard with Toyota Safety Sense 2.5+, which includes Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist, Automatic High Beams, Full-Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control, Lane Tracing Assist, and Road Sign Assist. On top of that, Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert is also standard in both grades.', 'along with Qi wireless charging on XLE unlimited grades. For 2023, the Prius lineup features Toyota Safety Sense 3.0, a standard safety suite that enhances the already familiar platform to an even higher level. It includes pre-collision system with pedestrian detection, lane departure alert with steering assist, automatic high beams, full speed range dynamic radar cruise control, lane tracing assist, road sign assist, and proactive driving assist.', 'Every Corolla grade comes standard with Toyota Safety Sense 3.0. which includes pre-collision system with pedestrian detection, lane departure alert with steering assist, automatic high beams, full speed range dynamic radar cruise control, lane tracing assist, road sign assist, and proactive driving assist. Additionally, the available blind spot monitor with rear cross traffic alert brings added convenience behind the wheel. With its engaging drive, intuitive tech, and design touchpoints, Corolla stands out from the crowd.']

Name: 3_Volvo
Representative_Docs: ['The all-new XC90. A new design, a new beginning. The all-new XC90.', "A year from now we'll be showing you the all-new XC90, which will feature Volvo's next generation of safety and driver support technologies. Most importantly though, the all-new XC90 will be the first Volvo model assembled on a scalable platform architecture, or what we like to call it, a SPOT. Going forward, all new Volvo models will be built on these highly adaptive, or should I say, scalable platforms.", 'There was huge interest when the all-new Volvo XC90 was unveiled to the world press. This car is the start signal for a new era for Volvo cars and the Volvo brand, where design, technology, environmental performance and safety are at a new, higher level. Volvo is well known to everybody, but now they see Volvo developing in direction, bringing in high-tech, very advanced solutions and technology really to strengthen our brand.']
